steps.title: Substitute x = −8 into h(x)
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $-8$ in the function definition:
$$h(-8) = 9|-8|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and multiply
steps.content:
The absolute value of $-8$ is $8$. Multiply by the coefficient:
$$h(-8) = 9 \cdot 8 = 72$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
